section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — cover page

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: blank (File an original and 1 copy)
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** Yes [ ] / No [X]
- **Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]** — Date of Report Being Amended: blank
- Notice printed on form: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."

Stamps/annotations: "HAND DELIVERED"; "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER 17 AUG 10 AM 9:15 OFFICE OF THE CLERK U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES" (received stamp, Aug 10 2017); handwritten initials "MC"; handwritten page label "Page 1 of 8"; "(For Official Use Only)".

Transaction grid: greyed example row (JT, Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock, Sale X, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B $15,001-$50,000) ignored per spec. First data row contains only the handwritten/typed text "Please see the attached" — no owner, no transaction type, no date, no amount checked. Remaining 3 grid rows blank.
